info.description: REST APIs for next-generation Radius Core resources (preview).

get.description: List the operations for the provider

ApplicationGraphConnection.description: Describes the connection between two resources.

direction.description: The direction of the connection. 'Outbound' indicates this connection specifies the ID of the destination and 'Inbound' indicates indicates this connection specifies the ID of the source.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying the origin of this edge. 'Connection' edges are author-declared entries under properties.connections. 'Dependency' edges are implicit dependencies derived from Bicep's dependsOn list (static graph only in Phase 1). Every emitted edge carries a kind.

ApplicationGraphOutputResource.description: Describes an output resource that comprises an application graph resource.

portalUrl.description: A deep link to the underlying resource in its cloud provider's portal (for example, the Azure portal). Empty when no link is available for the resource.

ApplicationGraphResource.description: Describes a resource in the application graph.

outputResources.description: The resources that comprise this resource.

connections.description: The connections between resources in the application graph.

diffHash.description: Stable hash over the authorable properties of this resource and its sorted dependsOn list. Used by tooling to classify resources as added, removed, modified, or unchanged across graphs. Format: 'sha256:{hex}'.

iconHash.description: SHA-256 hex of the resource type's icon SVG, matching `iconHash` on the resource-type registry. Null when the type has no icon registered. The bytes themselves are delivered inline via `ApplicationGraphResponse.icons` when the request specifies `includeIcons: true`; otherwise clients fetch bytes by hash from the resource-type icon endpoint.

properties.description: Resource-type-specific properties of the resource as returned by its resource provider. The shape of this map varies by `type` (e.g. a `Radius.Compute/containers` resource exposes different keys than `Radius.Datastores/redisCaches` or any user-defined resource type) and matches the `properties` returned by that resource's GET response. Top-level keys already surfaced as first-class fields on this model (`provisioningState`, `connections`) are omitted. The whole `status` object is also omitted because it may contain computed values that include sensitive data (for example, connection strings); the redundant `status.outputResources` list is surfaced via the dedicated `outputResources` field instead. Use `diffHash` rather than a byte-wise compare of this map to detect change.

ApplicationGraphResponse.description: Describes the application architecture and its dependencies.

resources.description: The resources in the application graph.

icons.description: Map from iconHash to the verbatim SVG UTF-8 bytes for every icon referenced by any resource in this response. Populated only when the request specifies `includeIcons: true`.

provisioningState.description: (Read Only) The status of the Application resource within the Radius control plane. Does not include the other resources that compose the Application.

environment.description: (Required) Fully qualified resource ID of the environment the application is deployed to

status.description: (Read Only) Deployment details for the Application, including any output resources Radius created for it.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

Azure.ResourceManager.CommonTypes.Tracke.description: The resource model definition for an Azure Resource Manager tracked top level resource which has 'tags' and a 'location'

AzureContainerInstanceCompute.description: The Azure container instance compute configuration

resourceGroup.description: The resource group to use for the environment.

BicepAuthenticationMethod.description: Supported authentication methods for private Bicep registries.

values.name: AwsIrsa
values.description: AWS IAM Roles for Service Accounts authentication.

BicepRegistryAuthentication.description: Authentication configuration for a single private Bicep registry. Only `BasicAuth` is currently supported, and it requires `basicAuthSecretId`; the controller rejects configs that omit it. `AzureWI` and `AwsIrsa` will be supported in the future.

authenticationMethod.description: (Optional) How Radius authenticates to the registry.

basicAuthSecretId.description: (Optional) The ID of a `Radius.Security/secrets` resource containing the username and password. Required when `authenticationMethod` is `BasicAuth`.

azureWiClientId.description: (Optional) Azure Workload Identity client ID. Required when `authenticationMethod` is `AzureWI`.

azureWiTenantId.description: (Optional) Azure Workload Identity tenant ID. Required when `authenticationMethod` is `AzureWI`.

awsIamRoleArn.description: (Optional) AWS IAM Role ARN for IRSA authentication. Required when `authenticationMethod` is `AwsIrsa`.

provisioningState.description: (Read Only) The status of the Bicep settings resource within the Radius control plane.

referencedBy.description: (Read Only) Resource IDs of the Environments that reference this Bicep settings resource.

registryAuthentications.description: (Optional) Authentication for private Bicep registries that host Recipe templates, keyed by registry hostname such as `corp.acr.io`. Radius matches a registry by the hostname in the Recipe source.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

BicepSettingsResourceListResult.description: The response of a BicepSettingsResource list operation.

value.description: The BicepSettingsResource items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

ConnectionKind.description: The origin of a connection: 'Connection' for author-declared entries in properties.connections, 'Dependency' for implicit entries derived from Bicep's dependsOn list.

values.name: Connection
values.description: The edge was declared by the author in properties.connections.

values.name: Dependency
values.description: The edge was inferred from a Bicep dependsOn entry (implicit dependency). Not emitted by the runtime graph in Phase 1 — runtime dependency extraction is Phase 2.

values.name: Outbound
values.description: The resource defining this connection makes an outbound connection resource specified by this id.

values.name: Inbound
values.description: The resource defining this connection accepts inbound connections from the resource specified by this id.

resourceId.description: The resource id of the compute resource for application environment.

identity.description: Configuration for supported external identity providers

provisioningState.description: (Read Only) The status of the Environment resource within the Radius control plane. Does not include the resources deployed to the Environment.

recipePacks.description: (Optional) Resource IDs of the Recipe Packs this Environment uses to provision infrastructure for application resources. When created with the Radius CLI, defaults to the `default` Recipe Pack in the `default` resource group.

recipeParameters.description: (Optional) Parameters passed to Recipes when they run, keyed by resource type. Values here override the default parameters defined in the Recipe Pack for every resource of that type deployed to this Environment.

providers.description: (Optional) Target compute platform and cloud provider accounts that resources are deployed into. When created with the Radius CLI, defaults to Kubernetes in the `default` namespace.

terraformSettings.description: (Optional) Resource ID of a `Radius.Core/terraformSettings` resource that supplies Terraform CLI settings, such as private registry credentials, used when running Terraform Recipes in this Environment.

bicepSettings.description: (Optional) Resource ID of a `Radius.Core/bicepSettings` resource that supplies Bicep engine settings, such as private registry authentication, used when running Bicep Recipes in this Environment.

simulated.description: (Optional) When true, the Environment is simulated and does not deploy real infrastructure. Recipes are evaluated but no resources are provisioned, which is useful for validating application definitions. Defaults to `false` if not specified.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

EnvironmentResourceListResult.description: The response of a EnvironmentResource list operation.

value.description: The EnvironmentResource items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

GetGraphRequest.description: Request body for the getGraph action.

includeIcons.description: When true, `ApplicationGraphResponse.icons` is populated with the SVG bytes for every distinct `iconHash` referenced by the response's resources. When false or omitted, only per-resource `iconHash` values are returned.

dependsOnEdges.description: Optional caller-supplied dependency edges, grouped by source resource ID. Each entry maps a source Radius resource ID to the list of outbound Kind: Dependency edges leaving that source. Every entry MUST have direction: Outbound and kind: Dependency; entries that don't are ignored. The server merges these onto the connection-only graph it computes from stored resources: excluded types are dropped, unknown endpoints are dropped, and any pair already present as Kind: Connection wins over the caller-supplied Dependency. Typically populated by `rad app graph -a <name> <app.bicep>` after compiling the Bicep template locally.

IdentitySettingKind.description: IdentitySettingKind is the kind of supported external identity setting

values.name: systemAssignedUserAssigned
values.description: System assigned and user assigned managed identity

IdentitySettings.description: IdentitySettings is the external identity setting.

oidcIssuer.description: The URI for your compute platform's OIDC issuer

resource.description: The resource ID of the provisioned identity

managedIdentity.description: The list of user assigned managed identities

namespace.description: The namespace to use for the environment.

localId.description: The logical identifier scoped to the owning Radius resource. This is only needed or used when a resource has a dependency relationship. LocalIDs do not have any particular format or meaning beyond being compared to determine dependency relationships.

id.description: The UCP resource ID of the underlying resource.

radiusManaged.description: Determines whether Radius manages the lifecycle of the underlying resource.

azure.description: (Optional) Configuration for deploying resources to Azure.

kubernetes.description: (Optional) Configuration for deploying resources to Kubernetes.

aws.description: (Optional) Configuration for deploying resources to AWS.

accountId.description: (Required) ID of the AWS account that resources are deployed into.

region.description: (Required) AWS region that resources are deployed into.

subscriptionId.description: (Required) ID of the Azure subscription that resources are deployed into.

resourceGroupName.description: (Optional) Name of the Azure resource group that resources are deployed into. Most Bicep and Terraform Recipes expect a resource group in the deployment context, so set this whenever deploying Azure resources.

identity.description: (Optional) Managed or workload identity Radius uses to authenticate to Azure when deploying resources.

namespace.description: (Required) Kubernetes namespace that workloads are deployed into.

ProvisioningState.description: Provisioning state of the resource at the time the operation was called

values.name: Accepted
values.description: The resource create request has been accepted

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: The resource has been successfully provisioned

values.name: Canceled
values.description: The resource provisioning has been canceled

RecipeDefinition.description: Recipe definition for a specific resource type

kind.description: (Required) The kind of Recipe, which determines how Radius runs it.

plainHttp.description: (Optional) Connect to the source using HTTP instead of HTTPS. Use this only when the source does not support HTTPS such as a locally hosted registry for Bicep recipes. Defaults to `false` if not specified.

source.description: (Required) Location of the Recipe. For Bicep Recipes this is an OCI registry reference. For Terraform Recipes this is the module source such as a Git URL or a Terraform registry module.

parameters.description: (Optional) Default parameter values passed to the Recipe when it runs. An Environment can override these per resource type through its `recipeParameters` property.

outputs.description: (Optional) Maps the module outputs onto the resource type properties for recipes that point directly at a Bicep or Terraform module. Each value is the module output name for a non-secret property. Under the reserved `secrets` key a nested object maps secret property names to module output names and always routes those outputs to the resource secret outputs.

provisioningState.description: (Read Only) The status of the Recipe Pack resource within the Radius control plane.

referencedBy.description: (Read Only) Resource IDs of the Environments that reference this Recipe Pack.

recipes.description: (Required) The Recipes in this pack, keyed by the resource type each Recipe provisions. Each key is a resource type such as `Radius.Data/redisCaches`.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

RecipePackResourceListResult.description: The response of a RecipePackResource list operation.

value.description: The RecipePackResource items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

RecipeParameterValue.description: Recipe parameter configuration for a specific resource type.

RecipeStatus.description: Recipe status at deployment time for a resource.

templateKind.description: TemplateKind is the kind of the recipe template used by the portable resource upon deployment.

templatePath.description: TemplatePath is the path of the recipe consumed by the portable resource upon deployment.

templateVersion.description: TemplateVersion is the version number of the template.

compute.description: The compute resource associated with the resource.

recipe.description: The recipe data at the time of deployment

TerraformCredentialConfig.description: Credential configuration for a Terraform registry or module source host.

secret.description: (Optional) The ID of a `Radius.Security/secrets` resource containing the authentication token. The secret must have a key named `token`.

include.description: (Optional) Provider address patterns to include for direct installation.

exclude.description: (Optional) Provider address patterns to exclude from direct installation.

TerraformProviderInstallation.description: Provider installation configuration for Terraform CLI.

networkMirror.description: (Optional) A network mirror to install providers from instead of the public registry.

direct.description: (Optional) Providers to install directly from the public registry rather than a mirror.

TerraformProviderMirror.description: Network mirror configuration for Terraform providers.

url.description: (Optional) The URL of the provider mirror.

include.description: (Optional) Provider address patterns to include from this mirror.

exclude.description: (Optional) Provider address patterns to exclude from this mirror.

provisioningState.description: (Read Only) The status of the Terraform settings resource within the Radius control plane.

referencedBy.description: (Read Only) Resource IDs of the Environments that reference this Terraform settings resource.

terraformrc.description: (Optional) Settings for the Terraform CLI configuration file. Radius renders these into a `.terraformrc` file used when running Terraform Recipes.

env.description: (Optional) Environment variables injected into the Terraform process during Recipe execution.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

TerraformSettingsResourceListResult.description: The response of a TerraformSettingsResource list operation.

value.description: The TerraformSettingsResource items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

TerraformrcConfig.description: Terraform CLI configuration file (.terraformrc) settings. See https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/config for details.

providerInstallation.description: (Optional) Controls where Terraform installs providers from, such as a network mirror instead of the public registry.

credentials.description: (Optional) Credentials for authenticating to private Terraform registries such as `app.terraform.io`. Maps a registry hostname to its credential configuration. This authenticates to Terraform CLI registries over HTTP and does not authenticate Git-based module sources, which use a separate mechanism.

RootScopeParameter.name: rootScope
RootScopeParameter.description: The scope in which the resource is present. UCP Scope is /planes/{planeType}/{planeName}/resourceGroup/{resourcegroupID} and Azure resource scope is /subscriptions/{subscriptionID}/resourceGroup/{resourcegroupID}
